message:
feat: add browser automation scaffolding behind feature flag

Implements wa-nu4.1.4.1 — BrowserAutomation scaffolding with Playwright
initialization, profile directory management, and safe logging.

New module: crates/wa-core/src/browser.rs (feature-gated: `browser`)

Configuration:
- BrowserConfig: headless mode, navigation/page-load timeouts,
  browser type selection (default: chromium, non-headless)
- Serde support with sensible defaults

Profile management:
- BrowserProfile: deterministic per-service/per-account directories
  under <data_dir>/browser_profiles/<service>/<account>/
- Path sanitization prevents traversal and special-char issues
- Directory creation with 0o700 permissions (Unix)
- profiles_root_from_data_dir() for consistent resolution

Browser context:
- BrowserContext: lazy initialization pattern (NotInitialized → Ready)
- ensure_ready() checks profiles dir + Playwright CLI availability
- Profile lookup via context.profile(service, account)
- Safe logging: paths logged, never secrets/tokens

lib.rs:
- Added `#[cfg(feature = "browser")] pub mod browser` export
- Updated module docs

Tests (20 new):
- Config: defaults, serde round-trip, defaults on missing JSON
- Profile paths: resolution, different services, sanitization,
  traversal prevention, directory creation, idempotency, permissions
- Sanitize: alphanumeric, special chars, dots, empty
- Context: not-initialized status, profile resolution, root path,
  config access
- profiles_root: Linux path, custom path

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
